description_long: This object consists of two ornate metal candlesticks of differing heights, each featuring a wide, round base for stability and a cup-shaped holder at the top for a candle. The stems of both candlesticks are artistically twisted, with one featuring a crescent moon and the other a five-pointed star as decorative elements entwined along the shaft. The metal has a dark, slightly weathered finish, giving the candlesticks an antique or gothic appearance. The bases are broad and flat, ensuring the candlesticks remain upright on flat surfaces. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban settings such as cafes, restaurants, or public event spaces. No visible wax, flames, or wicks are present in the holders.
description: A pair of dark, twisted metal candlesticks with star and crescent moon decorations, featuring wide bases and cup-shaped holders. The design is ornate and antique, ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the decorative crescent moon and star on the candlesticks, with both bases and cup holders clearly visible.
description_view_1: The twisted stems and the height difference between the two candlesticks are most apparent from this angle, with minimal view of the decorative elements.
description_view_2: The star and crescent moon decorations are prominently displayed, and the relative positioning of the candlesticks is clear.
description_view_3: The backs of the candlesticks are shown, with the twisted stems and cup holders visible but the decorative elements less prominent.
